what_changed.what: Doc comment above the function (previously lines ~515-529) rewritten to remove the claim that this test exercises 'the same class of race' as TestNewSnapshotClosesEpochAcquireVersionReadRace. Now explicitly states it is NOT a substitute for that deterministic regression test, cites the verifier's empirical finding (reverted read.go fix, TestGCUnderConcurrency -race -count=10 and -count=20 = 30 total runs, zero detections, vs. the deterministic hook-based test failing 1/1 on the same reverted code), and reframes this test as a broad, general-purpose stress test that COMPLEMENTS but does not replace the narrow deterministic test.
what_changed.why: Verifier's dimension test_coverage_and_teeth flagged this as an overclaim -- the real TOCTOU window (a few instructions between AcquireCurrentEpoch and cat.Get) is far too narrow for unforced goroutine scheduling under -race to reliably hit, so the doc comment's equivalence claim was empirically false.

what_changed.what: Removed the fixed readerRounds=15 constant. Readers now loop unbounded, driven by the same shared `stop` channel that already bounds writers and the compactor, so they keep opening/reading/closing snapshots for the entire testDuration (1500ms) instead of exhausting their 15 rounds early. Added a readerActive[] wall-clock span (start of first round to end of last round observed before `stop`) per reader, plus a post-wg.Wait() assertion (t.Fatalf) that every reader's active span is at least 50% of testDuration.
what_changed.why: Verifier's instrumentation showed all 8 readers previously finished in ~107ms of the ~1500ms testDuration (~93% of the run had zero open snapshots), undermining the doc comment's claim of readers overlapping writers/compactor 'throughout'. Looping on the shared stop signal structurally guarantees overlap for the full window; the new in-test assertion prevents silent regression of this coverage gap in the future.

verification_commands_run: go test ./mvcc/... -race -v -count=1 -> pass, all 12 test functions
go test ./mvcc/... -race -run TestGCUnderConcurrency -count=10 -v -> 10/10 pass, each run ~1.62-1.64s
go test ./mvcc/... -race -run TestGCUnderConcurrency -count=20 -v -> 20/20 pass, each run ~1.59-1.63s
go test ./... -race -count=1 -> pass across engine, btree, catalog, mvcc, wal; zero regressions
not_verified_by_self: Per invariant I4, this run did not verify its own work. Independent verification via /cdr:verify is required next.
